reach_why: Extends known concerns about optimization bias and evaluation limits, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fluency filters, lexical novelty, and present-judgment optimization to breakthrough suppression.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing filters and optimization regimes on later-recognized high-value explanations versus polished weak ones.
explanation: Surface fluency screens miss the real signal; present-judgment optimization can discard conceptually valuable but initially misread explanations.
